---
name: Tool request
about: Suggest a useful browser-based utility
title: "[Tool request] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What should the tool do?

Describe the input, expected output, and the problem it solves.

## Who would use it?

Tell us whether this is mainly for developers, writers, students, or everyday use.

## Privacy considerations

Can the tool work entirely in the browser, without uploading user input?
